data.title: Next Health in Boulder Announces Opening Celebration for the New Health Optimization & Longevity Center, March 26–29
data.description: A new biohacking facility, Next Health, has opened its debut location in Boulder, Colorado. The facility specializes in proactive longevity services driven by data. The launch event spanning four days from March 26 to March 29 will introduce the community to the services offered.

data.title: Tambourine Reimagines Nevis for a New Era of Luxury Travel, Honored with 2025 Adrian Award
data.description: Fort Lauderdale, Florida - Tambourine, a hospitality marketing and technology company based in Fort Lauderdale, has recently received a Silver 2025 Adrian Award for their successful brand and digital overhaul of Nevis. The award acknowledges their exceptional work in transforming the island's image and online presence. This recognition highlights Tambourine's expertise and dedication in revitalizing Nevis as a tourist destination.

data.title: Bundling Insurance Explained in HelloNation Featuring Insurance Agent Mike O'Boyle
data.description: An analysis conducted on the impact of bundling insurance revealed significant changes in premiums, deductibles, and coverage limits for homeowners and drivers living in Westchester County. Situated in White Plains, N.Y., on March 25, 2026, findings question the value of combining home and auto insurance policies. This practice could result in notable savings for individuals as it alters insurance costs and related factors within the specified region.

data.title: In Fort Fairfield, Real Estate Expert Stephanie Fields Beaulieu Breaks Down Rural Land Due Diligence in HelloNation Feature
data.description: In Fort Fairfield, Maine on March 25, 2026, a recent article from HelloNation advises potential buyers on essential steps to take when considering buying rural land in Aroostook County. The article offers a comprehensive due diligence checklist to avoid costly mistakes in the process. This guidance aims to assist buyers in making informed decisions and highlights key factors to assess before finalizing a purchase, ultimately ensuring a successful investment in the region.

data.title: Pediatric Occupational Therapy Expert Kathy Schleifer of Pueblo Explains How Feeding Therapy Helps Children Who Struggle With Food for HelloNation
data.description: In Pueblo, Colorado, on March 25, 2026, an article published by HelloNation delves into the reasons behind why some children exhibit aversions to certain foods or have strong reactions to varying textures during meals. The insights are provided by Kathy Schleifer, a Pediatric Therapy Expert based in Pueblo. The article delves into the complexities of feeding habits in children, shedding light on the factors influencing these behaviors.

data.title: Why Coinbase May Get Hit By Clarity Act Updates But Robinhood And Circle Not
data.description: Proposed changes to the Clarity Act could potentially restrict the offering of stablecoin rewards, which could have a significant impact on centralized cryptocurrency platforms like Coinbase (NASDAQ: COIN) as per analysis by Needham Research. The main focus of concern is the possibility of banning passive yield for stablecoin holders on exchanges, notably affecting platforms such as Coinbase where earning yield has played a crucial role in attracting users. In comparison, decentralized finance platforms are anticipated to face minimal impact, given that their rewards are commonly categorized as "active" rather than passive. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Intelex Partners with Safety Function and Launches Industry's First High Energy Control Assessment (HECA™) Application
data.description: A recent partnership between Intelex and Safety Function has resulted in the launch of the industry's inaugural High Energy Control Assessments (HECA™) application aimed at preventing Serious Injury and Fatality (SIF) incidents. This innovative collaboration brings a pioneering solution that addresses crucial safety concerns.

data.title: Domo Adds Spreadsheet-Native Exploration and New Semantic Layer to Its Agent-Building Platform
data.description: In Silicon Slopes, Utah, Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) unveiled a significant enhancement to its core business intelligence platform, facilitating data manipulation for business users. The upgrade includes advanced features for analysts to improve data modeling and offers enhanced governance controls for data teams. Unlike traditional BI tools that require users to adjust to complex analytics software, Domo's latest update provides a more intuitive user experience. This marks a crucial development in the industry, aiming to streamline data processes.

data.title: Sales Empowerment Group, the Go-to-Market Partner for the Mid-Market, Completes Acquisition Integrations and Rebrands as Brickwork
data.description: In Chicago, Sales Empowerment Group, a leading go-to-market partner for mid-market companies, recently finished acquiring and merging with another company and has now rebranded as Brickwork.
